Caspian.Toddler.Dialog.Mon: Do you think %farm pirates would sound cool? I'd totally name it after out farm because I love our farm!
Caspian.Toddler.Dialog.Tue: I asked Mom how I can help and she told me to go outside and get rid of the weeds.#$b#So I did!$1
Caspian.Toddler.Dialog.Wed: I went to the library to look at books about boats.#$b#I didn't quite get anything...so I asked Auntie Robin but then I understood even less.
Caspian.Toddler.Dialog.Thu: Can I be a pirate farmer?#$b#Farmer pirate...hm...is that a thing?$3
Caspian.Toddler.Dialog.Fri: I tried using the hose today...#$b#...please don't go check the crops...
Caspian.Toddler.Dialog.Sat: Playing with the otehr kids? Sorry, I am busy trying to figure out how to bend wood to my will so I can make a boat.#$b#No, I don't need help, I can do this...somehow.
Caspian.Toddler.Dialog.Sun: I went to the beach to look at the boats there. Uncle Willy showed me his boat and promised me I can be captain!
Caspian.Toddler.Gift.Loved: This is for me? Wow! Thank you so much!$1
Caspian.Toddler.Gift.Liked: I like this a lot, thank you!
Caspian.MovieInvite_Invited: Oh! I always wanted to watch a movie, yay!$1
Caspian.Movie.With_Parent_Before: What is the movie about? I can't wait!
Caspian.Movie.With_Parent_Script: %Caspian is really distracted by the movie.
Caspian.Movie.love_Before: %Caspian is tugging at your sleeve.#$b#When does it start? I can't wait any longer.
Caspian.Movie.love_After: This was so fun!#$b#I really, really liked this movie!
Caspian.Movie.like_After: It was really nice, thank you for taking me.
Caspian.Movie.dislike_Before: Hm, I wonder what this movie is about...
Caspian.Toddler.Dialog.Farmhouse.1: I just took a nap...somehow I am still tired.#$b#I think I'm going to run around the farm now.
Caspian.Toddler.Dialog.Farmhouse.2: I read a book about maps today at the museum.#$b#I didn't understand everything but the maps were really cool.
Caspian.Toddler.Dialog.Farmhouse.3: I am collecting bugs to study them. I wanted to collect things in the water but mom said that wasn't a good idea when the waters were so unruly like right now.
Caspian.Toddler.Dialog.Farmhouse.4: I made my bed today! It was hard reaching across but I did it!#$b#The only tedious part was putting all my plushies on them, maybe I have too many...
Caspian.Toddler.Dialog.Farmhouse.5: I like being outside. There's so much to do.#$b#Spending time inside is nice too though, like helping out mom in the kitchen or when she shows me how to punch!
Caspian.Toddler.Dialog.Farmhouse.6: I want my own crew when I am older!#$b#We gonna be like family and sail the sea. I will make maps and bring back lots of treasure for you and mom!$1
Caspian.Toddler.Dialog.Farmhouse.7: I cleaned up under my bed and found candy I thought I had lost...#$b#...it was uh, quite dusty so mom took it away saying it'd be a bad idea to eat it in that state.#$b#Aw, I really looked forward to eating that candy.
Caspian.Toddler.Dialog.Farmhouse.8: %Kid1 told me that the best fruit are the highest up on the tree so I tried climbing to the top...#$b#Mom caught me in time. She even used her sligshot to shoot some fruits down for me.$1
Caspian.Toddler.Dialog.Farmhouse.9: Look how fast I can run!#+$b#This way no one can catch me when I am running away with my treasure.
Caspian.Toddler.Dialog.Farmhouse.10: Don't be mad but I think I accidentally burnt your favorite shorts when I mistook them for an oven mitt...which I accidentally left in the turned-on oven...
Caspian.Festivals.spring13: Do you think we can make devilled eggs with the eggs you gonna catch this year? Or maybe egg-mayo sandwiches...
Caspian.Festivals.spring24: I prefer watching others dance. Mom looks really pretty in her dresss though!$1
Caspian.Festivals.summer11: What will you put in this year? Mom said you gonna say first so we know if we should eat it or not.
Caspian.Festivals.summer28: Jellies are neat. Can we have one as a pet?
Caspian.Festivals.fall16: Hmmmm...I tried the fishing game. Mom showed me a trick for the other ones but I am not as good, how about you?
Caspian.Festivals.fall27: I saw there's real monster around...I-I don't need to be scared...right?#$b#Mom said she and you will protect us if something happens.
Caspian.Festivals.winter25: I was being really nice this year.$1#$b#Do you think I will get a present too?
